base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dot_regular — a pickup_item from 1980 pac man. Small white dot — 10 points each. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Small white dot — 10 points each; 240 per maze; eating all clears level
